# Meson cross-compilation file for building picolibc against our
# xv6-rs kernel surface, aarch64 flavor.
#
# Compiler: clang --target=aarch64-none-elf (same one we use in
# crates/kernel/build.rs for aarch64 user binaries — no brew
# aarch64-elf-binutils required, everything ships with Xcode CLT
# plus rustup's bundled LLVM tools).

[binaries]
c = ['clang', '--target=aarch64-none-elf']
ar = '/Users/maix/.rustup/toolchains/nightly-aarch64-apple-darwin/lib/rustlib/aarch64-apple-darwin/bin/llvm-ar'
ld = '/Users/maix/.rustup/toolchains/nightly-aarch64-apple-darwin/lib/rustlib/aarch64-apple-darwin/bin/gcc-ld/ld.lld'
strip = '/Users/maix/.rustup/toolchains/nightly-aarch64-apple-darwin/lib/rustlib/aarch64-apple-darwin/bin/llvm-strip'
nm = '/Users/maix/.rustup/toolchains/nightly-aarch64-apple-darwin/lib/rustlib/aarch64-apple-darwin/bin/llvm-nm'
objcopy = '/Users/maix/.rustup/toolchains/nightly-aarch64-apple-darwin/lib/rustlib/aarch64-apple-darwin/bin/llvm-objcopy'

[host_machine]
system = 'xv6rs'
cpu_family = 'aarch64'
cpu = 'cortex-a72'
endian = 'little'

[properties]
needs_exe_wrapper = true
sys_root = ''
skip_sanity_check = true

[built-in options]
c_args = ['-march=armv8-a', '-nostdlib', '-fno-pie', '-static', '-ffreestanding', '-fno-stack-protector', '-fno-asynchronous-unwind-tables', '-fno-builtin', '-Os']
c_link_args = ['-nostdlib', '-static']
